name: Analytical World
short_description: Analytical World chronicles the courageous journey of the last surviving analyst to rescue Earth and preserve the universal balance. Immerse yourself in a cosmic odyssey brimming with mysteries as you, the final analyst, protect the fabric of existence.
detailed_description:
Story:
Caution: The game is intended to be humorous and should not be taken too seriously.

The analysts were the most powerful and oldest life forms, dedicated to preserving the balance of the universe. Analytical World follows the captivating tale of the last surviving analyst and their mission to rescue Earth. Suddenly, a rogue virus begins spreading across the planet, devoid of any apparent cause. With no one else to rely on, the lone analyst must make quick decisions, act wisely, and delve deep into the enigmatic secrets surrounding the phantom.



Game:
Immerse yourself in an interactive, open 2D world as you unravel the mysteries of a mysterious virus that threatens to wipe out entire planets. Your primary objective is to save the remaining survivors and avert doomsday by utilizing your analyzer to gradually uncover information and explore the expansive realm of the analytical universe.



Extras:
While playing, you'll not only uncover the story behind the Phantom and how to stop the virus, but also encounter a plethora of amusing situations, numerous Easter eggs, and references to various trends and memes.
